properties: Negundo interior is said to have various therapeutic properties, including antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. More research is needed to fully understand the potential therapeutic benefits of Negundo interior.
constituents: Negundo interior, also known as Horse Chestnut or Buckeye, contains various active constituents, including saponins, flavonoids, and phenolic acids. These compounds are responsible for the plant's medicinal properties, such as anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The saponins present in Negundo interior may help to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health.
